description:
Concert Diary recreates a personal diary for concerts and festivals.
Concert Diary is an Android app for recording concerts and festivals as personal diary entries.

You can:
• Store events with date, location, and artists
• Add personal notes and ratings for each event
• Attach photos and videos from concerts and festivals
• Track setlists and related artists
• Store tickets for upcomming events PDFs for quick access

Artist images can be automatically fetched via the Deezer API, but this can be disabled in settings.

All data is stored locally on the device using Room.

The app is available in English and German.

Export and import of database supported.
